name: pape-superpowers
description: Personal fork of obra/superpowers, trimmed to the axes that aren't redundant with native Claude Code features and split into per-axis plugins (foundation, TDD, debugging, code review, writing-skills) so a session only pays context for what it needs. Install the `superpowers` umbrella for the full trimmed set.

plugins.name: superpowers-foundation
plugins.description: Foundation: using-superpowers bootstrap + brainstorming. Required by every other axis plugin.

plugins.name: superpowers-code-review
plugins.description: Requesting and receiving code review. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-writing-skills
plugins.description: Writing skills (the meta skill). Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Umbrella plugin: depends on every surviving superpowers axis plugin. Install for the full trimmed set; install per-axis plugins instead for narrower scope.
